title: Include subitems in chart by Date

posts.author: dapug (David Pugmire)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have this chart across a few boards, and the x-axis is grouped by Month.

image787×408 14.9 KB

But it only shows top level tasks, NO subitems, and I cannot for the life of me figure out how to include subitems in this chart.

Anyone know how?

Also frustrating is Monday.com chart settings are erratic. The only way to group by date is to clear the x-axis, and then SOMETIMES “Group By” will show up as an option, but sometimes it wont… just whenever it feels like it. And even if I do get it to show up, I can set it to “Month” or “Week” and SOMETIMES it will work and show things, sometimes it wont, just whenever it feels like it. Is this feature supposed to actually work, or is it legit riddled with bugs and limitations?

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello David,

I am Nacho and i am part of the Decadis Team.

Perhaps it is useful for you to try our app sumUp for monday.

We have the Group by widget in which you can group sub-items.

If you have any doubt, feel free to create a request in our support portal.

Kind regards,

Nacho

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@dapug if an add-on is an option, you can create such chart with the Analytics & Reports add-on by Screenful. You can use both top level items and subitems, and any of your date columns, as data source in a stacked bar chart.

Here’s the guide for getting started with the free trial.
